home.cvUploadHint: Upload 2-4 CVs for the richest profile. We'll merge them automatically.
home.jdHint: Paste a JD so we can tailor your profile immediately.
home.uploadAtLeastOne: Upload at least one CV to continue
home.addMoreFiles: Add more files for a richer profile

processing.jdUrlInvalid: That doesn't look like a valid URL — you can add it later
processing.jdFetchFailed: The site blocked us — you can paste the text later

gaps.title: Gap Analysis
gaps.jdMissingBannerUrl: That URL didn't look valid. Paste the job description text to run gap analysis.
gaps.jdMissingBannerFetch: We couldn't load that job posting — it may be blocked or taken down. Paste the job description text to run gap analysis.
gaps.directMatchesBadge: {count, plural, one {# direct match} other {# direct matches}}
gaps.likelyMatchesBadge: {count, plural, one {# likely match} other {# likely matches}}
gaps.gapsToAddress: {count, plural, one {# gap to address} other {# gaps to address}}
gaps.resolvedBadge: {count, plural, one {# gap resolved ✓} other {# gaps resolved ✓}}
gaps.gapsIdentified: {count, plural, one {# gap identified} other {# gaps identified}}
gaps.clickGapHint: Click a gap to answer it directly
gaps.gapCHint: We'll help you address this in the interview.
gaps.gapBHint: We think you might have this — confirm to strengthen your profile.
gaps.gapInterviewHint: Answer a few questions to close the gaps

interview.gapsRemaining: {count, plural, one {# gap remaining} other {# gaps remaining}}
interview.categoryBBadge: We think you might have this experience based on your background — help us confirm.
interview.placeholder: Type your answer… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line)
interview.resumeBanner: Welcome back — continuing where you left off.
interview.gapsRemainingConfirm: You have {count} {count, plural, one {gap} other {gaps}} remaining — are you sure you want to end?
interview.completionGapsResolved: Great work! Your profile has been enriched.
interview.completionOther: Your answers have been saved to your Master Profile.
interview.viewHistory: View conversation history ({count} {count, plural, one {exchange} other {exchanges}})

cv.directionPlaceholder: Give Kaile a direction, correction, or extra context…
cv.shareWithRole: My CV for the role "{roleTitle}" was optimised with Applire. Precise. Confident. Future-Ready.
cv.shareGeneric: My CV was optimised with Applire. Precise. Confident. Future-Ready.
cv.templateClassicDesc: Traditional German format — structured, photo-ready, with table layout.
cv.templateModernDesc: Clean, single-column design for the European market. No photo.
cv.templateExecutiveDesc: Dark header, two-column, serif font — for executives and senior profiles.
cv.templateTechDesc: Code aesthetic, dark background, monospace — for software engineers and DevOps.
cv.templateCreativeDesc: Colored sidebar, two-column, round avatar — for design and creative roles.
cv.templateAcademicDesc: Conservative layout, serif font, publication list — for academic and research roles.
cv.templateCompactDesc: Maximum information density, two-column grid — for experienced professionals.
cv.selectTemplateHint: Choose a template for your tailored CV.
cv.generationStale: Taking longer than expected — you can come back later.
cv.photoStepHint: German employers typically expect a professional photo on your CV. It's optional but recommended for DACH applications.
cv.photoLaterHint: You can add a photo later in Profile → Photo
cv.assistQuestionError: Kaile couldn't generate a question. Please try again.
cv.assistSuggestionError: Suggestion couldn't be generated. Please try again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageHint: Choose the language of the user interface.
settings.gdprHint: Manage your personal data in accordance with GDPR (Art. 17 & 20).
settings.exportHint: Download a complete JSON export of all your data (GDPR Art. 20).
settings.deleteHint: Permanently erase all your data, including applications, CVs, and profile (GDPR Art. 17).
settings.deletionIrreversible: This action is irreversible. All your data will be permanently erased:
settings.deletionItemApplications: All applications and their flow sessions
settings.defaultCVColorHint: Used when no company color can be detected.

offline.message: You appear to be offline. Some features may not work.

errors.uploadAtLeastOne: Please upload at least one CV to continue.
errors.http504: This is taking longer than usual. Please try again.
errors.http503: Service temporarily busy. Please wait and retry.
errors.http502: Processing error. Please try a different format.
errors.generic: An error occurred ({status}). Please try again.
